)![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png" sizes="36px](Tony Dinh's avatar" srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png 36w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_72,h_72,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png 72w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_108,h_108,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png 108w" width="36" height="36" draggable="false" class="img-OACg1c object-fit-cover-u4ReeV pencraft pc-reset"/>)created **four** small but successful products (all will be mentioned later in this post)

- built an audience of **97K followers** on Twitter

- created this newsletter with **6,000+** subscribers

- jumped on **the AI hype train** and successfully created a product with it

- and survived a drama that **almost killed** my business

At the moment, my total revenue across all products is about $45K/month at ~90% profit.

I want to take this opportunity to write a recap of my journey so far. I hope this will be helpful for people who are looking to become their own boss one day.

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg" width="1456" height="1681" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":1681,"width":1456,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":1468234,"alt":null,"title":null,"type":"image/jpeg","href":null,"belowTheFold":false,"topImage":true,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}" alt srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 1456w" sizes="100vw" fetchpriority="high" class="sizing-normal"/>)

Before quitting my job, I was a software engineer with 7 years of experience (in 2021).

I love building software. My first software product was built with Visual Basic 6 in high school. Throughout my career, I have always had some side projects along with my full-time job.

Below is a summary of my full career history:

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg" width="1376" height="1542" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":1542,"width":1376,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":null,"alt":"Image","title":null,"type":null,"href":null,"belowTheFold":true,"topImage":false,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}](Image" title="Image" srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 1456w" sizes="100vw" loading="lazy" class="sizing-normal"/>)Thanks to 7 years working in the industry, I picked up a lot of useful skills: frontend, backend, DevOps, mobile apps, game dev, and a bit of UX/UI design.

These skills became my biggest advantage and have helped me tremendously later in my journey.

Early 2020, COVID happened. I was forced to work remotely alone at home (in a foreign country).

It was incredibly boring.

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg" width="450" height="300" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":300,"width":450,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"type":null,"href":null,"belowTheFold":true,"topImage":false,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}" alt srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 1456w" sizes="100vw" loading="lazy" class="sizing-normal"/>)I discovered [http://IndieHackers.com)IndieHackers.com) and started listening to their podcast every day. I got really inspired by the stories of successful indie hackers like [https://twitter.com/levelsio)Pieter Levels), [https://twitter.com/kylegawley)Kyle Gawley), [https://twitter.com/yongfook)Jon Yongfook) (and many more).

The inspiration, the boredom of COVID, and the extra time I got from not having to commute to work led me back to my passion: building software products.

So I gave it a try. I started working on a new side project with the hope of generating some revenue.

My first attempt was to build a log viewer macOS app.

As a good software engineer, I wanted the app to have a beautiful UI, tons of features, a comprehensive architecture, and a unit test suite with >95% test coverage.

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png" width="1456" height="1362" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":1362,"width":1456,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"type":null,"href":null,"belowTheFold":true,"topImage":false,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}" alt srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 1456w" sizes="100vw" loading="lazy" class="sizing-normal"/>)I worked on it for ~6 months. web_discovery_results.summary: Ο συγγραφέας, ένας solopreneur, μοιράζεται την ιστορία του από το μηδέν έως τα $45.000 μηνιαίως σε 2 χρόνια, χτίζοντας τέσσερα μικρά αλλά επιτυχημένα προϊόντα. Αξιοποίησε τις δεξιότητές του ως μηχανικός λογισμικού (frontend, backend, DevOps, mobile apps, game dev, UX/UI) για να δημιουργήσει αυτά τα προϊόντα, εκμεταλλευόμενος την έμπνευση από το Indie Hackers και τον περισσότερο ελεύθερο χρόνο λόγω της απομακρυσμένης εργασίας κατά την πανδημία COVID-19. Έχει χτίσει κοινό 97.000 ακολούθων στο Twitter και ένα newsletter με πάνω από 6.000 συνδρομητές, εκμεταλλευόμενος την τάση της Τεχνητής Νοημοσύνης για τη δημιουργία ενός προϊόντος. Το επιχειρηματικό του μοντέλο έχει σχεδόν 90% κέρδος.
key_facts: Αξιοποιήθηκε η τάση της Τεχνητής Νοημοσύνης για τη δημιουργία προϊόντος.
Οι δεξιότητες περιλαμβάνουν frontend, backend, DevOps, mobile apps, game dev, και UX/UI design.
Η πορεία ξεκίνησε λόγω της έμπνευσης από επιτυχημένους indie hackers και της απομακρυσμένης εργασίας κατά την πανδημία.

web_discovery_results.full_content: Several marketing strategies can be employed to effectively reach and engage target audiences. Some of the most common tactics include:1. Content Marketing: Creating valuable and relevant content, such as blogs, videos, and infographics, to attract and retain customers while establishing expertise in a niche.2. Search Engine Optimization (SEO): Optimizing website content and structure to improve visibility on search engines, helping potential customers find your business more easily.3. Social Media Marketing: Utilizing platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn to engage with audiences, promote products, and build brand awareness.4. Email Marketing: Sending targeted emails to nurture leads, inform customers of promotions, and foster loyalty by providing regular value.5. Pay-Per-Click Advertising (PPC): Using paid ads on search engines and social media to drive traffic to your site, allowing for immediate visibility and targeting specific audience segments.6. Influencer Marketing: Collaborating with social media influencers to leverage their reach and credibility within specific audiences.7. Public Relations (PR): Managing the public perception of your business through media relations, press releases, and community engagement efforts.By evaluating the unique aspects of your business and industry, you can determine which strategies will be most effective in achieving your marketing goals.

)![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png" sizes="36px](Tony Dinh's avatar" srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png 36w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_72,h_72,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png 72w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!m_gW!,w_108,h_108,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52001ffc-c1bd-44ea-b987-45661aab4680_512x512.png 108w" width="36" height="36" draggable="false" class="img-OACg1c object-fit-cover-u4ReeV pencraft pc-reset"/>)created **four** small but successful products (all will be mentioned later in this post)

- built an audience of **97K followers** on Twitter

- created this newsletter with **6,000+** subscribers

- jumped on **the AI hype train** and successfully created a product with it

- and survived a drama that **almost killed** my business

At the moment, my total revenue across all products is about $45K/month at ~90% profit.

I want to take this opportunity to write a recap of my journey so far. I hope this will be helpful for people who are looking to become their own boss one day.

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg" width="1456" height="1681" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":1681,"width":1456,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":1468234,"alt":null,"title":null,"type":"image/jpeg","href":null,"belowTheFold":false,"topImage":true,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}" alt srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bdpk!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9eacc001-a04d-40b0-9795-6faabaf292e5_3024x3491.jpeg 1456w" sizes="100vw" fetchpriority="high" class="sizing-normal"/>)

Before quitting my job, I was a software engineer with 7 years of experience (in 2021).

I love building software. My first software product was built with Visual Basic 6 in high school. Throughout my career, I have always had some side projects along with my full-time job.

Below is a summary of my full career history:

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg" width="1376" height="1542" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":1542,"width":1376,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":null,"alt":"Image","title":null,"type":null,"href":null,"belowTheFold":true,"topImage":false,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}](Image" title="Image" srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PNv_!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5e84a260-69b4-422c-8ea5-f863894c1ba5_1376x1542.jpeg 1456w" sizes="100vw" loading="lazy" class="sizing-normal"/>)Thanks to 7 years working in the industry, I picked up a lot of useful skills: frontend, backend, DevOps, mobile apps, game dev, and a bit of UX/UI design.

These skills became my biggest advantage and have helped me tremendously later in my journey.

Early 2020, COVID happened. I was forced to work remotely alone at home (in a foreign country).

It was incredibly boring.

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg" width="450" height="300" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":300,"width":450,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"type":null,"href":null,"belowTheFold":true,"topImage":false,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}" alt srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!CNwI!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4faf39b1-1e30-472c-8baf-8e1753146afd_450x300.jpeg 1456w" sizes="100vw" loading="lazy" class="sizing-normal"/>)I discovered [http://IndieHackers.com)IndieHackers.com) and started listening to their podcast every day. I got really inspired by the stories of successful indie hackers like [https://twitter.com/levelsio)Pieter Levels), [https://twitter.com/kylegawley)Kyle Gawley), [https://twitter.com/yongfook)Jon Yongfook) (and many more).

The inspiration, the boredom of COVID, and the extra time I got from not having to commute to work led me back to my passion: building software products.

So I gave it a try. I started working on a new side project with the hope of generating some revenue.

My first attempt was to build a log viewer macOS app.

As a good software engineer, I wanted the app to have a beautiful UI, tons of features, a comprehensive architecture, and a unit test suite with >95% test coverage.

![https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png" width="1456" height="1362" data-attrs="{"src":"https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png","srcNoWatermark":null,"fullscreen":null,"imageSize":null,"height":1362,"width":1456,"resizeWidth":null,"bytes":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"type":null,"href":null,"belowTheFold":true,"topImage":false,"internalRedirect":null,"isProcessing":false,"align":null,"offset":false}" alt srcset="https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_424,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 424w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_848,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 848w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_1272,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 1272w, https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!011X!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2e48554f-82de-4434-86c1-37399feb4430_1600x1497.png 1456w" sizes="100vw" loading="lazy" class="sizing-normal"/>)I worked on it for ~6 months. web_discovery_results.summary: Ο συγγραφέας, ένας solopreneur, μοιράζεται την ιστορία του από το μηδέν έως τα $45.000 μηνιαίως σε 2 χρόνια, χτίζοντας τέσσερα μικρά αλλά επιτυχημένα προϊόντα. Αξιοποίησε τις δεξιότητές του ως μηχανικός λογισμικού (frontend, backend, DevOps, mobile apps, game dev, UX/UI) για να δημιουργήσει αυτά τα προϊόντα, εκμεταλλευόμενος την έμπνευση από το Indie Hackers και τον περισσότερο ελεύθερο χρόνο λόγω της απομακρυσμένης εργασίας κατά την πανδημία COVID-19. Έχει χτίσει κοινό 97.000 ακολούθων στο Twitter και ένα newsletter με πάνω από 6.000 συνδρομητές, εκμεταλλευόμενος την τάση της Τεχνητής Νοημοσύνης για τη δημιουργία ενός προϊόντος. Το επιχειρηματικό του μοντέλο έχει σχεδόν 90% κέρδος.

Οι δεξιότητες περιλαμβάνουν frontend, backend, DevOps, mobile apps, game dev, και UX/UI design.
Η πορεία ξεκίνησε λόγω της έμπνευσης από επιτυχημένους indie hackers και της απομακρυσμένης εργασίας κατά την πανδημία.

web_discovery_results.full_content: Several marketing strategies can be employed to effectively reach and engage target audiences. Some of the most common tactics include:1. Content Marketing: Creating valuable and relevant content, such as blogs, videos, and infographics, to attract and retain customers while establishing expertise in a niche.2. Search Engine Optimization (SEO): Optimizing website content and structure to improve visibility on search engines, helping potential customers find your business more easily.3. Social Media Marketing: Utilizing platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn to engage with audiences, promote products, and build brand awareness.4. Email Marketing: Sending targeted emails to nurture leads, inform customers of promotions, and foster loyalty by providing regular value.5. Pay-Per-Click Advertising (PPC): Using paid ads on search engines and social media to drive traffic to your site, allowing for immediate visibility and targeting specific audience segments.6. Influencer Marketing: Collaborating with social media influencers to leverage their reach and credibility within specific audiences.7. Public Relations (PR): Managing the public perception of your business through media relations, press releases, and community engagement efforts.By evaluating the unique aspects of your business and industry, you can determine which strategies will be most effective in achieving your marketing goals.
